sentences.arabic: تَغْسِلُ لُجَيْنُ يَدَيْهَا قَبْلَ كُلِّ وَجْبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ludjejn pere ruke prije svakog obroka.
sentences.translationEn: Lujain washes her hands before every meal.

sentences.arabic: تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ غَسِيلَ الْيَدَيْنِ يَمْنَعُ الْأَمْرَاضَ.
sentences.translation: Zna da pranje ruku sprečava bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: She knows that washing hands prevents diseases.
She washes them with soap for twenty seconds.

sentences.translation: Naučila je svog malog brata istu naviku.
sentences.translationEn: She taught her little brother the same habit.
